{{CargoRelic
|name=Three Purities
|class_id=20268
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This is a portrait from the Otherworld, sealing the Taoist ancestor's core spirits. It is a special image created by Lao Tzu, one of the three purities, under some special space-time conditions of the Otherworld.
|fame=19
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +1<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss2=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +2<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss3=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +3<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss4=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +3<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss7=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +3<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types<br> (Awakened)
}}
